title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Marketplace Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
